title: Downloads/offline playback capability spike
evidence: Spec written
DRM/API legality unknown
Ric corrected blocker: offline/download is not permission-blocked in principle; proceed to sanctioned SDK/API implementation proof while avoiding STREAM manifest caching.

2026-06-17 11:00 PT: debug-only OfflineProof runner proved authenticated usage=DOWNLOAD manifest (200) and SDK PlaybackMode.OFFLINE playback-info returns manifest-bearing PlaybackInfo.Track; downloads/{trackId}=500 and offlineTasks=400, so next seam is installation inventory/task/download id orchestration. Artifact: reports/offline-proof-2026-06-17-1100/latest.json.

2026-06-17 11:15 PT: extended OfflineProof runner to probe installation registration/inventory and bytecode-derived OfflineTasks query shapes. Live result: installations lookup 400 GENERIC_REQUEST_ERROR, installations create 500 INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, offlineTasks generated/first-page shapes still 400 MISSING_REQUIRED_PARAMETER. Artifact: reports/offline-proof-2026-06-17-1115/latest.json.

2026-06-17 11:30 PT: decompiled Retrofit annotations and corrected POST semantics: installationsPost and offlineInventory POST use Idempotency-Key header, not countryCode query. Updated debug runner accordingly and added discovery probes for downloads?filter[id], installations?filter[owners.id], and UserOfflineMixes. Live result: DOWNLOAD manifest still 200; corrected installations create still 500; downloads list/filter 500; owner installation lookup 500; UserOfflineMix by user id 404; UserOfflineMix items with page cursor 0 returned 400 INVALID_CURSOR. Artifact: reports/offline-proof-2026-06-17-1130-discovery/latest.json.

2026-06-17 11:45 PT: debug-only runner proved local OfflinePlayProvider + OfflineCacheProvider + Encryption wiring with app-private Media3 SimpleCache; artifact reports PlaybackInfo.Offline.Track construction and cache UID present. Server orchestration id/license seam remains unresolved.

2026-06-17 12:02 PT: inspected generated UserOfflineMixes/Downloads/OfflineTasks/Installations models and added debug-only cursor/locale alternates. Live result: userOfflineMix by user id remains 404 with en-US; items with cursor=0 remain 400 INVALID_CURSOR; items without cursor return 500; downloads filter by track id still 500; offlineTasks generated shapes still 400 MISSING_REQUIRED_PARAMETER. Artifact: reports/offline-proof-2026-06-17-1202-offline-mix-cursors/latest.json.

2026-06-17 12:16 PT: inspected non-tidalapi player/offline bytecode. TidalMediaSourceCreator has a concrete PlaybackInfo.Offline branch: progressive uses storage/decrypted-header factories, DASH uses PlayerDashOfflineMediaSourceFactory with offlineLicense + Storage and OfflineDrmHelper.setOfflineLicense. Drm callback has no hidden offline endpoint branch; no hidden Downloads/OfflineTasks/create endpoint found in player artifacts. Missing seam remains source of offlineLicense/Storage/download bytes, likely an OfflinePlaybackInfoProvider implementation or first-party orchestration.

2026-06-17 12:36 PT: added debug-only Player construction/injection proof at the public OfflinePlayProvider seam. Runtime artifact shows Player constructed with custom OfflinePlayProvider, getOfflineTrackPlaybackInfo returned PlaybackInfo.Offline.Track, app-private SimpleCache UID present, secret key length 32, manifest present, and no offline license/download URL logged. Artifact: reports/offline-proof-2026-06-17-1236-player-provider-injection/latest.json.

2026-06-17 12:46 PT: searched local packaged artifacts and upstream tidal-sdk-android source for a real OfflinePlaybackInfoProvider/provisioning implementation. Indexed 23 artifacts / 6,271 classes / 626 offline candidates; javap found 137 reference hits but 0 concrete provider implementers. Upstream source at 86c48c3 confirms PlaybackInfoRepositoryDefault only delegates to the app-supplied provider, and the only implementation is a test stub. Artifacts: reports/offline-proof-2026-06-17-1246-offline-provider-impl-search/.

2026-06-17 12:56 PT: debug-only OfflinePlaybackStore/provider adapter persists a sanctioned usage=DOWNLOAD manifest result as app-private metadata, reloads it, and serves a reconstructed PlaybackInfo.Offline.Track through OfflinePlayProvider with app-private SimpleCache. Runtime artifact: reports/offline-proof-2026-06-17-1256-store-adapter/latest.json. No media bytes cached and no offline playback claimed; missing seam is sanctioned media bytes/offline license source.

2026-06-17 13:09 PT: debug-only downloadManifestShape probe decoded the sanctioned usage=DOWNLOAD DASH manifest without logging URLs. Live artifact shows one representation, one SegmentTemplate with initialization/media templates, SegmentTimeline present, 4 absolute URLs, no ContentProtection, looksSegmentAddressable=true, and cacheFillCandidateWithoutLicense=true for track 5120026. Artifact: reports/offline-proof-2026-06-17-1309-download-manifest-shape/latest.json.

2026-06-17 cache-fill proof: sanctioned usage=DOWNLOAD DASH manifest filled app-private Media3 cache on emulator; artifact reports 2,428,102 cache bytes, 53 cache keys, 100% downloader progress, no URLs logged, and no offline playback claim yet.

2026-06-17 13:45 PT: added debug-only network-disabled replay probe after sanctioned usage=DOWNLOAD cache fill. Runtime artifact shows cache fill still succeeds, ExoPlayer parses duration 200100ms, but replay misses cache and attempts disabled chunk upstream; state BUFFERING->IDLE, ExoPlaybackException Source error, playbackClaimed=false. Artifact: reports/offline-proof-2026-06-17-1345-network-disabled-replay-manifest-ok/latest.json.

Capability spike completed: usage=DOWNLOAD manifest fetch, segment-addressable shape, app-private cache fill, OfflinePlayProvider wiring, store/provider reconstruction, and network-disabled replay attempt are all proven/documented.
Latest replay artifact narrows remaining work to cache-key/storage alignment: reports/offline-proof-2026-06-17-1345-network-disabled-replay-manifest-ok/latest.json.
Follow-up implementation issue created: https://github.com/keylimesoda/Untidy/issues/25.
acceptance: Prove the exact TIDAL offline provisioning path for this app
If viable, define single-track MVP implementation plan
If not viable, remove/neutralize fake download affordances
next: Spike complete. Follow-up implementation moved to UNTIDY-024 / GitHub #25: align offline cache keys/storage for network-disabled replay and single-track MVP.
